# Santander

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Clasificacion Suelos](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/clasificacion-suelos/)
- [Columnas Grava](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/columnas-grava/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/compresion-simple/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Densidad Cono Arena](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/densidad-cono-arena/)
- [Dilatometro](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/dilatometro/)
- [Drenaje Geotecnico](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/drenaje-geotecnico/)

- [Erosion Suelos](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/erosion-suelos/)
- [Estabilidad Taludes](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/estabilidad-taludes/)

- [Exploracion](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/exploracion/)
- [Factor Seguridad](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/factor-seguridad/)
- [Flujos Detritos](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/flujos-detritos/)
- [Geoceldas](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/geoceldas/)
- [Geofisica](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/geofisica/)

- [Mejoramiento](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/mejoramiento/)
- [Microtremores Hvsr](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/microtremores-hvsr/)
- [Monitoreo Taludes](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/monitoreo-taludes/)
- [Muestreo Inalterado](https://santander.geotecnia.vip/muestreo-inalterado/)

## Contact
- Website: https://santander.geotecnia.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
